prompt: Resolve dependencies for 'order-cancellation'. Outbound calls: payment-service POST /api/refunds, notification-service POST /api/notifications/send. Repo registry contains: payment-service (Spring Boot), user-service (NestJS). notification-service is NOT in the registry.

assertions.text: payment-service outbound call is matched to the payment-service repo in the registry
notification-service is marked as unresolved with reason 'not in repository registry'
Outbound Calls table status is updated: payment-service to 'resolved', notification-service to 'not-in-registry'
Resolved Dependencies section has an H3 for payment-service with trace data

prompt: Resolve dependencies. Outbound call target is 'payment' (inferred from URL http://payment/api/charges). Repo registry has 'payment-service'. No exact match exists.

assertions.text: The outbound call to 'payment' is matched to 'payment-service' via partial name matching
The dependency is not incorrectly marked as unresolved due to name mismatch

prompt: Resolve dependencies for 'checkout'. Settings: max_depth=2. Depth 1: payment-service has outbound call to fraud-service. Depth 2: fraud-service has outbound call to risk-engine-service. All repos in registry.

assertions.text: payment-service dependency is resolved at depth 1
fraud-service transitive dependency is resolved at depth 2
risk-engine-service (depth 3) is listed as unresolved with reason 'max depth reached'
dependency_depth in frontmatter is set to 2

prompt: Resolve dependencies for a feature with 5 outbound calls. 3 are resolved, 1 is not in registry, 1 is max depth exceeded.

assertions.text: phase in frontmatter is 'resolved' (all resolvable deps handled even though some are unresolvable)
Unresolved Dependencies section lists each unresolved dep with its specific reason

prompt: Resolve dependencies for 'order-cancellation'. All outbound calls resolved successfully.

assertions.text: Output recommends starting a fresh Claude session before running generate
Output includes the specific command: /feature-documenter:generate order-cancellation
Output mentions clean context window or output quality as the reason for a fresh session
